what_happened: Created a new workflow template for claude-plugins CI
why: New template needed for the claude-plugins external repo
fix_applied: Modeled directly after the existing electron-ci.yml template in .github/workflow-templates/
pattern_to_remember: Workflow templates in .github/workflow-templates/ follow a consistent pattern: top comment naming the target repo, name: field, pull_request/{push to main} triggers, top-level permissions: {}, per-job permissions: {contents: read}, SHA-pinned actions/checkout and actions/setup-node, npm ci for installs, TODO comments for project-specific commands. dependency-scan job uses actions/dependency-review-action with fail-on-severity: high and does NOT install Node or run npm ci — it only needs checkout.
